events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: pre-entry test **fails**. O2 (20.9%), LEL (2%), and CO (5 ppm) are all within acceptable limits, but **H2S at 55 ppm** far exceeds the standard entry alarm/action threshold (~10 ppm), so entry cannot be authorized until the space is ventilated and re-tested (or supplied-air respiratory protection is implemented per a revised permit).
